heading: What do I have to do to update my clusters for TLS 1.2?
body:
- Conduct an audit of your applications for support of TLS (Transport Layer Security) 1.2.

- Update all components of your technology stack that don't support
  TLS (Transport Layer Security) 1.2.

- [Configure Additional Configuration Options](scale-cluster-more-configuration-options) your cluster
  configuration to use TLS (Transport Layer Security) 1.2.
